name: Street Fight : Beat Em Up
description: Street Fight : Beat Em Up is an epic fighting game where a hero rises to end the war for shadow energy. Choose your side among three powerful clans and master three unique fighting styles like ninja, knight, or samurai. Collect the best weapons, armor sets, and skins to customize your warrior. Win hero battles, defeat powerful bosses, explore the story, and show off your skills in duels. Participate in events, unlock rare rewards, and enjoy realistic combat animations in this action-packed RPG adventure!
instructions: Arrow Keys ndash Move Z ndash Punch X ndash Kick C ndash Block
